name: Company Fundamentals Sync
description: Weekly (Saturday 8 AM ET): Fetches financial ratios and company profiles from FMP for all active tickers. Updates fundamentals table. Critical for Value and Growth screening.

parameters.content:
## Fundamentals Sync

Required: httpHeaderAuth (FMP), postgresApi
APIs: FMP /api/v3/ratios, /api/v3/profile

parameters.query: SELECT ticker FROM tickers WHERE is_active=true ORDER BY ticker

INSERT INTO fundamentals (ticker,period_date,period_type,revenue,net_income,eps,pe_ratio,pb_ratio,ps_ratio,debt_to_equity,roe,roa,current_ratio,dividend_yield,payout_ratio,revenue_growth,earnings_growth,free_cash_flow,gross_margin,operating_margin,net_margin,last_updated) VALUES ('{{$json.ticker}}','{{$json.period_date}}','annual',{{$json.revenue}},{{$json.net_income}},{{$json.eps}},{{$json.pe_ratio}},{{$json.pb_ratio}},{{$json.ps_ratio}},{{$json.debt_to_equity}},{{$json.roe}},{{$json.roa}},{{$json.current_ratio}},{{$json.dividend_yield}},{{$json.payout_ratio}},{{$json.revenue_growth}},{{$json.earnings_growth}},{{$json.free_cash_flow}},{{$json.gross_margin}},{{$json.operating_margin}},{{$json.net_margin}},NOW()) ON CONFLICT (ticker,period_date,period_type) DO UPDATE SET revenue=EXCLUDED.revenue,pe_ratio=EXCLUDED.pe_ratio,roe=EXCLUDED.roe,dividend_yield=EXCLUDED.dividend_yield,last_updated=NOW();
